title: OpenAPI Document
description: Schema describing the top-level structure of an OpenAPI 3.1.0 document, the industry standard for defining RESTful APIs.

openapi.description: The OpenAPI Specification version. Must be a supported version string.

jsonSchemaDialect.description: The default JSON Schema dialect for Schema Objects in this document.

servers.description: An array of Server Objects providing connectivity information to target servers.

webhooks.description: Incoming webhooks that may be received by the API provider.

security.description: A declaration of which security mechanisms can be used across the API.

tags.description: A list of tags used by the document with additional metadata.
